memo_reasons: no artifact-backed original results survived validation
no original result resolved to a real saved artifact

reference_catalog.text: CDC BRFSS 2022 Survey Data and Documentation landing page. Accession: BRFSS-2022-annual-data-page. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/annual_2022.html. Official CDC page confirming availability of 2022 BRFSS documentation and downloadable materials; opened during this run.

CDC Calculated Variables in the 2022 BRFSS Data File. Accession: 2022-calculated-variables-version4-508. https://www.cdc.gov/brfss/annual_data/2022/pdf/2022-calculated-variables-version4-508.pdf. Official PDF opened during this run; confirms _CURECI2 is the calculated current e-cigarette-use variable derived from ECIGNOW2.

BRFSS 2015 Diabetes Health Indicators GitHub mirror referenced in user hint. Accession: diabetes_binary_5050split_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anandprakash0/Diabetes-prediction/main/data/diabetes_binary_5050split_health_indicators_BRFSS2015.csv. Candidate CSV mirror suggested by the user hint. Retrieval was attempted from raw.githubusercontent.com in this run but failed due network/DNS resolution in the execution environment.

summary: Routing to a research memo because the run did not clear the paper gate.
